title: Are there any stable working examples of API access with PHP?
excerpt: Are there any stable examples of utilising the API to create an item in a board using PHP. The API Quickstart for PHP seems to have issues in the code, I think around the arrays.

posts.author: adeery (MR ALAN DEERY)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there any stable examples of utilising the API to create an item in a board using PHP. The API Quickstart for PHP seems to have issues in the code, I think around the arrays.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @adeery,

Welcome to the community!

We are working on verifying the PHP Quickstart. In the meantime, there was a conversation recently here.

Best,
Rachel
